rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: Head-group parallelism partitions BETWEEN heads (not WITHIN head dim) and is for parallel execution + KV compression. Snippet explicitly distinguishes itself from within-head partitioning.
Kimi Linear interleaves KDA with full attention at LAYER level in 3:1 ratio; not dim-level even-odd interleave within heads.
MatchFormer interleaves cross/self-attention BETWEEN layers; orthogonal to within-head dim partition.
GQA groups Q-heads sharing K,V to reduce KV memory; does not partition dim dimension within a head.
TransMLA latent compression of multi-head; entirely different mechanism, no dim-interleave.
SWAN interleaves NoPE-global with SWA-RoPE-local at LAYER level; not within-head dim split.

U-shape Frequency-Band Aware uses parallel time/freq attentions with CONTIGUOUS-band split; candidate explicitly differentiates from contiguous-band split via comb-interleave. Only loose 'parallel attentions' overlap.
FIT interleaves local+global transformer BLOCKS; not within-head dim interleave.
